# crowci_repository (Resource)

Activates a repository on the Crow CI server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "crowci_repository" "example" {
  forge_remote_id = "123456"

  timeout    = 120
  visibility = "private"

  trusted = {
    network  = false
    security = false
    volumes  = false
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `forge_remote_id` (String) The ID of the repository at the forge.

### Optional

- `allow_deploy` (Boolean) Allow deploy pipelines.
- `allow_manual` (Boolean) Allow manual pipeline triggers.
- `allow_pr` (Boolean) Allow pull request pipelines.
- `cancel_previous_pipeline_events` (List of String) Pipeline events for which previous runs should be cancelled.
- `config_file` (String) Path to the pipeline configuration file.
- `deploy_team` (String) Team allowed to trigger deploy pipelines.
- `forge_id` (Number) Forge ID (for multi-forge setups). Uses the default forge when not set.
- `logs_keep_duration` (String) Duration to keep pipeline logs (e.g. 720h).
- `logs_keep_min` (Number) Minimum number of pipeline logs to keep.
- `netrc_trusted` (List of String) Hostnames for which .netrc credentials are trusted.
- `require_approval` (String) Approval requirement for pipelines ('forks', 'all', 'none').
- `timeout` (Number) Pipeline execution timeout in minutes.
- `trusted` (Attributes) Trusted configuration for the repository. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--trusted))
- `visibility` (String) Repository visibility ('public', 'private', 'internal').

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the repository is active.
- `avatar_url` (String) Avatar URL for the repository.
- `clone_url` (String) HTTPS clone URL.
- `clone_url_ssh` (String) SSH clone URL.
- `default_branch` (String) Default branch of the repository.
- `forge_url` (String) URL of the repository at the forge.
- `full_name` (String) Full repository name (owner/name).
- `id` (Number) Repository ID assigned by Crow CI.
- `name` (String) Repository name.
- `org_id` (Number) Organization ID the repository belongs to.
- `owner` (String) Repository owner.
- `pr_enabled` (Boolean) Whether pull request pipelines are enabled.
- `private` (Boolean) Whether the repository is private.

<a id="nestedatt--trusted"></a>
### Nested Schema for `trusted`

Optional:

- `network` (Boolean) Allow network access for trusted operations.
- `security` (Boolean) Allow security-sensitive operations.
- `volumes` (Boolean) Allow volume mounts.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = crowci_repository.example
  id = "42"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import crowci_repository.example 42
```
